items.title: Dependency License Checker
items.description: Scans newly added dependencies for license compliance (GPL, AGPL, etc.) at session end
items.searchText: dependency license checker scans newly added dependencies for license compliance (gpl, agpl, etc.) at session end sessionend compliance license dependencies session-end

items.title: Governance Audit
items.description: Scans Copilot agent prompts for threat signals and logs governance events
items.searchText: governance audit scans copilot agent prompts for threat signals and logs governance events sessionstart sessionend userpromptsubmitted security governance audit safety

items.title: Secrets Scanner
items.description: Scans files modified during a Copilot coding agent session for leaked secrets, credentials, and sensitive data
items.searchText: secrets scanner scans files modified during a copilot coding agent session for leaked secrets, credentials, and sensitive data sessionend security secrets scanning session-end

items.title: Session Auto-Commit
items.description: Automatically commits and pushes changes when a Copilot coding agent session ends
items.searchText: session auto-commit automatically commits and pushes changes when a copilot coding agent session ends sessionend automation git productivity

items.title: Session Logger
items.description: Logs all Copilot coding agent session activity for audit and analysis
items.searchText: session logger logs all copilot coding agent session activity for audit and analysis sessionstart sessionend userpromptsubmitted logging audit analytics

items.title: Tool Guardian
items.description: Blocks dangerous tool operations (destructive file ops, force pushes, DB drops) before the Copilot coding agent executes them
items.searchText: tool guardian blocks dangerous tool operations (destructive file ops, force pushes, db drops) before the copilot coding agent executes them pretooluse security safety pretooluse guardrails
